rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; no new qualitative changes in regional security or energy this cycle.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — confidence vote pending
top_events.summary: The nominated Liberal PM still awaits a parliamentary confidence vote, keeping Romanian domestic politics in flux with direct implications for EU funds and economic policy.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could ease energy prices relevant to Romanian households, but uncertainty persists and no deal is confirmed yet.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli strikes on Beirut maintain Middle East instability, with indirect effects on Black Sea regional energy market sentiment and Romanian import costs.
